title: SiTime Analyst Expectations and Price Targets - Strong Buy Consensus
text: Based on analysis of 14 Wall Street analysts, SITM has a bullish consensus with a median price target of $450.00 (ranging from $400.00 to $500.00). The overall analyst rating is Strong Buy (9.1/10), with 8 Buy ratings, 1 Hold rating, and 0 Sell ratings. For the second quarter of 2026, analysts are currently estimating revenue of $113.9 million and EPS of $1.19. For longer-term forecasts, analysts forecast that SITM's EPS will be $6.80 for 2027, and in 2028, SITM's EPS is forecast to hit $8.88. Recent analyst activity shows strong bullish sentiment with price targets raised to $900 from $450 at Roth Capital and to $800 from $435 at Goldman Sachs following Q1 2026 results.
